desc: Turn the HID-restored diagnostic Alpine image into a reproducible B0 release-like RAM distro: pinned packages, normal init/service ordering, framebuffer login plus ttydc0 output, watchdog and bounded health report, no secrets/network/storage discovery/block nodes, storage-disabled DT, complete size/package/file manifest, arm64 host validation, and two-build reproducibility. Package work may start after 078, but do not close this ticket until the separately reviewed live HID candidate has passed. Stop before new rig work. Experiment 4 in docs/BOOTABLE_BUILD_EXPERIMENTS.md.
author: codex
